Strategic Equipment Finance for Commercial Trades & Civil Contractors

Professional equipment financing solutions from $20K to $500K+ for heavy machinery, commercial vehicles, and specialised trade equipment. Competitive rates with flexible terms designed for established commercial businesses.

Get Equipment Finance Quote Calculate Repayments
✓ 24-48 Hour Approvals ✓ Competitive Commercial Rates ✓ $500M+ Equipment Financed

Equipment We Finance for Commercial Trades

Heavy Machinery & Construction

  • Excavators, Diggers & Earthmoving Equipment
  • Cranes & Lifting Equipment
  • Concrete Pumps & Mixers
  • Bulldozers & Graders
  • Compactors & Road Construction

Commercial Vehicles & Fleet

  • Commercial Utes & Work Vehicles
  • Truck & Heavy Vehicle Fleet
  • Specialised Service Vehicles
  • Trailers & Transport Equipment
  • Van Conversions & Fit-Outs

Trade & Industrial Equipment

  • Welding & Fabrication Machinery
  • HVAC Installation Equipment
  • Electrical Testing & Safety Equipment
  • Workshop Tools & Machinery
  • Material Handling Equipment

Specialised Contractor Equipment

  • Mining & Resources Equipment
  • Agricultural & Farming Machinery
  • Telecommunications Equipment
  • Medical & Healthcare Equipment
  • Technology & IT Infrastructure

Professional Equipment Finance Process

1

Equipment Assessment

We evaluate your equipment needs, business capacity, and optimal financing structure aligned with your cash flow requirements.

2

Strategic Structuring

Our team structures the finance solution to maximize tax benefits and minimise business disruption during equipment acquisition.

3

Lender Comparison

We negotiate with multiple commercial lenders to secure competitive rates and terms specific to your industry and equipment type.

4

Fast Settlement

Professional management of documentation and settlement processes ensures you can deploy your equipment quickly and efficiently.

Why Commercial Trades Choose EVFBS Equipment Finance

Industry Expertise

Deep understanding of commercial trades, civil contracting, and industrial business requirements. We know your equipment and industry challenges.

Flexible Terms

Loan terms from 12-60 months with seasonal payment options and balloon payments available to match your business cash flow patterns.

Competitive Rates

Access to commercial finance rates typically 2-4% lower than consumer finance, with equipment security reducing your overall cost of capital.

Tax Optimisation

Strategic structuring to maximize depreciation benefits, and other tax advantages available to commercial businesses.

Cash Flow Protection

Preserve working capital for operations while acquiring essential equipment. Structured to maintain healthy cash flow during growth phases.

Fast Approvals

24-48 hour approval processes for established commercial businesses, enabling you to secure equipment quickly for time-sensitive projects.

Equipment Finance Solutions Available

Equipment Loan

Traditional ownership model with equipment as security

  • Loan amounts: $20K - $500K+
  • Terms: 12-60 months
  • Immediate ownership
  • Full depreciation benefits

Equipment Lease

Operational lease with end-of-term options

  • Lower monthly payments
  • 100% tax deductible
  • Upgrade options available
  • Maintenance packages

Hire Purchase

Ownership transfer at completion

  • Fixed monthly payments
  • Balloon payment options
  • GST and tax benefits
  • Equipment ownership

Ready to Finance Your Next Equipment Purchase?

Join hundreds of commercial trades and civil contractors who've secured strategic equipment finance through our professional service.
